expression: Top''/Bottom Board: {([Width]) - 2 * ([BoardThick])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Side Board: {([Height])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Back Board: {([Width])} x {([Height])} x {([BackBoardThick])} x 1pcs
author: sheenhoong

remarks.zh: 计算橱柜的板材尺寸。[Width], [Height],[Depth] 为整体尺寸，[BoardThick] 为顶部、底部和侧板的材料厚度，[BackBoardThick] 为背景板的材料厚度。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.en: Calculates board sizes for a cabinet. [Width], [Height],[Depth] is total Measurement, [BoardThick] is Top, Bottom and Side Board material thickness, [BackBoardThick] is Background Board material thickness.
remarks.ms: Mengira saiz papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] adalah ukuran keseluruhan, [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan Lembaga Atas, Bawah, dan Sisi, [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan Papan Belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.id: Menghitung ukuran papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] adalah ukuran total, [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan Papan Atas, Bawah, dan Samping, [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan Papan Belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.th: คำนวณขนาดกระดานสำหรับตู้ [Width], [Height], [Depth] คือขนาดทั้งหมด, [BoardThick] คือความหนาของวัสดุห้องข้างบน, ด้านล่างและด้านข้าง, [BackBoardThick] คือความหนาของวัสดุพื้นกล่อง (AI translated, please check)
remarks.vi: Tính kích thước bảng cho tủ. [Width], [Height], [Depth] là kích thước tổng, [BoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu của bảng Trên, Dưới và Cạnh, [BackBoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu của bảng Lưng. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.tl: Kinakalkula ang mga laki ng kahoy para sa kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] ay ang kabuuang Sukat, ang [BoardThick] ay ang Kapal ng Materyal sa Itaas, Ilalim at Gilid na Kahoy, ang [BackBoardThick] ay ang Kapal ng Materyal sa Background na Kahoy. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.my: Cabinet အတြက္ ဘုတ္ချပျပားအရြယ္အစား ရွာႏိုင္ လို႔습니다....(AI produced by ယမင္း.)
